userProfile.title: My account
userProfile.subtitle: Manage your profile and security settings
userProfile.passwordHelp: You can request a secure link to define a new password.
userProfile.passwordEmailNotice: The password change link will be sent to your email address using the Gmail account configured in GDPR settings.
userProfile.passwordRequestSuccess: An email with a password change link has been sent.
userProfile.passwordRequestError: Error sending the password change link
